name: CONV2D 1×1
signature: void conv2dk1_i8(int8_t* input, int8_t* kernels, uint8_t* output, int32_t input_width, int32_t input_channels, int32_t output_channels, int scale);
description: Vectorized 2D convolution with 1×1 kernel. INT8 activations and weights, UINT8 output with right-shift scaling. Select INT8_ACT or UINT8_ACT (default) via define.
